Category: A:Agriculture, forestry and fishing/01:Crop and animal production, hunting and related service activities/016:Support activities to agriculture and post-harvest crop activities/0161:Support activities for crop production
Name: irrigation, surface | irrigation | EN15804, U
Description: This dataset represents the surface irrigation in Spain with a 45% irrigation efficieny (FAO 1989). The inventory includes the water pumping of ground water and surface water. The water supplied to the plants (1m3) and the water evaporated or infiltrated shall be included in the crop production datasets. This dataset starts with pumping water from wells and water bodies. This dataset ends with delivering water to the plant and includes the water pumping, energy use, but not the water emissions of irrigation (shall be included in the crop production dataset). The basins and furrows used for surface irrigation are typically made from natural materials and no infrastructure is assumed. Dataset documentation: https://v391.ecoquery.ecoinvent.org/Details/UPR/7525177a-700f-44e5-b413-42b0d96bf6e1/290c1f85-4cc4-4fa1-b0c8-2cb7f4276dce (corresponding process in the cut-off system model)

Category: C:Manufacturing/20:Manufacture of chemicals and chemical products/201:Manufacture of basic chemicals, fertilizers and nitrogen compounds, plastics/2011:Manufacture of basic chemicals
Name: market for dimethyl malonate | dimethyl malonate | EN15804, U
Description: This is a market activity. Each market represents the consumption mix of a product in a given geography, connecting suppliers with consumers of the same product in the same geographical area. Markets group the producers and also the imports of the product (if relevant) within the same geographical area. They also account for transport to the consumer and for the losses during that process, when relevant.;This is the market for  'dimethyl malonate', in the Global geography.;Transport from producers to consumers of this product in the geography covered by the market is included.;dimethyl malonate'  is an organic substance with a CAS no. : 000108-59-8. It is called 'dimethyl propanedioate' under IUPAC naming and its molecular formula is: C5H8O4. It is liquid under normal conditions of temperature and pressure and appears as a colourless liquid. It is slightly soluble in water. It is modelled as a pure substance.  There is no publicly available information about the consumption of this substance on a consumer level. On industrial sites, the substance is used for the manufacture of products in the following sectors: chemicals (as an intermediate). This activity starts at the gate of the activities that produce 'dimethyl malonate',  within the geography of Global. This activity ends with the supply of 'dimethyl malonate',  to the consumers of this product. Transport is included. Product losses during transportation are assumed negligible and are therefore not included. Dataset documentation: https://v391.ecoquery.ecoinvent.org/Details/UPR/b26ddc42-6b3c-48a9-a8f6-0ffc45882629/290c1f85-4cc4-4fa1-b0c8-2cb7f4276dce (corresponding process in the cut-off system model)

Name: concrete block production | concrete block | EN15804, U
Description: No losses and no waste water have been taken into account. The used concrete is "normal concrete";[This dataset was already contained in the ecoinvent database version 2. It was not individually updated during the transfer to ecoinvent version 3. Life Cycle Impact Assessment results may still have changed, as they are affected by changes in the supply chain, i.e. in other datasets. This dataset was generated following the ecoinvent quality guidelines for version 2. It may have been subject to central changes described in the ecoinvent version 3 change report (http://www.ecoinvent.org/database/ecoinvent-version-3/reports-of-changes/), and the results of the central updates were reviewed extensively. The changes added e.g. consistent water flows and other information throughout the database. The documentation of this dataset can be found in the ecoinvent reports of version 2, which are still available via the ecoinvent website. The change report linked above covers all central changes that were made during the conversion process.]  includes the raw material normal concrete which is poured into a mould, air-dryed and packed. Some transports and infrastructure are also included. Category: D:Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply/35:Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply/351:Electric power generation, transmission and distribution/3510:Electric power generation, transmission and distribution
Name: electricity, high voltage, import from HR | electricity, high voltage | EN15804, U
Description: This dataset represents the amount of imported electricity from a specific geography to this country. The import value is valid for 2014 and includes all electricity imports, independently whether used within the importing country, or re-exported. For a discussion of different ways of modeling electricity trade in LCI, please refer to (Itten & Frischknecht 2014). This activity represents the point of 'handing over' the electricity from one country to the other at the border. This dataset doesn't include any electricity losses or transmission infrastructure as these are accounted for in the market datasets. Dataset documentation: https://v391.ecoquery.ecoinvent.org/Details/UPR/6d01a985-344e-4c01-87cd-1701c3cbb763/290c1f85-4cc4-4fa1-b0c8-2cb7f4276dce (corresponding process in the cut-off system model)

Category: E:Water supply; sewerage, waste management and remediation activities/38:Waste collection, treatment and disposal activities; materials recovery/383:Materials recovery/3830:Materials recovery
Name: treatment of used vegetable cooking oil, purification | used vegetable cooking oil, purified | EN15804, U
Description:
This dataset represents the purification of waste vegetable cooking oil before its esterification. ;This dataset could be too used for the treatment of waste animal fat. The studied plant treats both types of waste. ;None;Data have been collected for the annual production of the esterification plant and adapted to production of one liter of vegetable oil methyl esther. To fit with the current ecoinvent datasets, collected data have been divided between a purification step and an esterification step. This dataset considers only the purification step.  From reception of waste cooking oil at factory gate.  This activity ends at esterification plant with the purified used vegetable cooking oil. 
The dataset includes the treatment of impurities and water removal from the used vegetable cooking oil, the intermediate storage of the oil and treatment of specific wastewater effluents.  Dataset documentation: https://v391.ecoquery.ecoinvent.org/Details/UPR/4652fed1-6d0f-484f-bab9-37fa7aeda614/290c1f85-4cc4-4fa1-b0c8-2cb7f4276dce (corresponding process in the cut-off system model)

Category: E:Water supply; sewerage, waste management and remediation activities/38:Waste collection, treatment and disposal activities; materials recovery/382:Waste treatment and disposal/3821:Treatment and disposal of non-hazardous waste
Name: market for waste polyethylene | waste polyethylene | EN15804, U
Description: This is a market activity, representing a treatment mix. In the case of products needing treatment, market mixes are supplied by the activities treating the product in the geography defined by the market, and they supply the activities needing to treat the product, as they have generated it as a by-product in the Undefined processes (present as a negative input in system models). Transport to the treating facility or losses are also accounted in this type of markets, when relevant.;This market dataset models the disposal mix for 1 kg of waste polyethylene in Bulgaria using country-specific data. The mix is composed by the following technologies: 3% of open burning, 3% of open dump, 89% of unsanitary landfill, 5% of municipal incineration. Values are rounded without decimals. If a technology is listed, it participates in the technology mix. The transport from the production site of the waste to the different treatment facilities where the waste is treated is accounted here. Collection of the waste is included in the transport estimate, reflecting transport distances from eurostat. There are no losses considered in the dataset. Reference: eurostat, 2018, Summary of annual road freight transport by type of operation and type of transport (1 000 t, Mio Tkm, Mio Veh-km), Retrieved online at: http://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/web/transport/data/database on 05 of June 2018 The activity starts with the input from the treatment processes. A market for a material for treatment (wastes or recyclables) ends with the provision of treatment, i.e. a mix of treatment providers, to activities that generate the reference product as a waste/by-product. Dataset documentation: https://v391.ecoquery.ecoinvent.org/Details/UPR/a8e71e6f-84a9-4e33-a080-6df1c93a083b/290c1f85-4cc4-4fa1-b0c8-2cb7f4276dce (corresponding process in the cut-off system model)
